name: Energy Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Add figs, honey, orange juice, and 2 tablespoons lemon juice to a food processor and mix on "chop" setting until fig bits are finely chopped. Set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine all other ingredients except oat bran. Beat with an electric mixer for 3-4 minutes at medium speed.
3. Add the fig mixture to the dry ingredients and beat until everything is well combined.
4. Roll the mixture into 20-24 balls and coat them with the oat bran on a plate.
5. Place the balls in a pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes, or until they are warm and slightly puffed.
6. Allow the energy balls to cool in the refrigerator until firm. For a crunchier texture, bake an additional 2-5 minutes, or until the dough is thoroughly cooked.
